_note: Migrates the hello-dcs docker-compose service onto Deployment+Service+ConfigMap. Page 02 is an interactive editor edit (REPLACE_WITH_HARBOR_IMAGE -> ${DCS_REGISTRY}/samples/hello-dcs:1.0); reproduced headless with a single-quoted sed that leaves the literal ${DCS_REGISTRY} in the file so the following envsubst can expand it. Rollout waits added after the initial apply and after 'oc set env' so verify-greeting-configured sees the new Pod. Page 05 (what-doesn't-translate) is read-only prose + knowledge-check notes with no examiner tests, so nothing to exclude — all 5 checks run and pass on CRC (no admission-rejection lesson here).

steps.run: sed -i 's|REPLACE_WITH_HARBOR_IMAGE|${DCS_REGISTRY}/samples/hello-dcs:1.0|' deployment.yaml && envsubst < deployment.yaml | oc apply -f - && oc rollout status deploy/hello-dcs --timeout=150s
oc exec deploy/hello-dcs -- sh -c 'if [ -n "$GREETING" ]; then echo "GREETING is set: $GREETING"; else echo "GREETING NOT set — app is using its built-in default"; fi'
oc set env deploy/hello-dcs --from=configmap/hello-dcs-config && oc rollout status deploy/hello-dcs --timeout=120s
